code: import api from'./api';const projectService={fetchProjects:async()=>{const response=await api.get('/projects');return response.data;},fetchProjectBySlug:async slug=>{const response=await api.get(`/projects/${slug}`);return response.data;},createProject:async project=>{const response=await api.post('/projects',project);return response.data;},updateProject:async(id,project)=>{const response=await api.put(`/projects/${id}`,project);return response.data;},deleteProject:async id=>{const response=await api.delete(`/projects/${id}`);return response.data;}};export default projectService;
